task_completion.description: Open the Electrical Engineering Calculations app
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Electrical Engineering Calculations app launched and visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the motor slip calculation tool
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the specific screen or tool within the app dedicated to calculating motor slip.

task_completion.description: Enter the synchronous and measured rotor speeds
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show '1800' entered into the synchronous speed input field and '1725' entered into the measured/rotor speed input field.

task_completion.description: Calculate and display the slip percentage
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the app displaying the calculated slip percentage result (approximately 4.16% or 4.17%).

task_completion.description: Create and save the result text file with the required content
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a text editor saving a file named 'motor_slip_result.txt' in the '/sdcard/tasks/' directory, containing the lines 'Synchronous_RPM: 1800', 'Measured_RPM: 1725', and 'Slip_Percentage: [numeric result]'.

integrity.description: Agent used the Electrical Engineering Calculations app to find the answer
integrity.visual_evidence: The slip percentage result must be seen generated by the Electrical Engineering Calculations app GUI, rather than the agent skipping the app and calculating it externally.

integrity.description: Agent used a GUI text editor to create the result file
integrity.visual_evidence: The text file creation and editing should be visible in a GUI text editor app, not executed via command-line interface or terminal emulator.

integrity.description: The recorded slip percentage matches the app's output
integrity.visual_evidence: The numeric value entered for 'Slip_Percentage' in the text file must match the calculated value previously shown on the app's screen.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The correct synchronous speed is 1800 RPM and measured rotor speed is 1725 RPM. The exact slip percentage is 4.1667%. The VLM should accept any slip percentage value in the result file that falls between 4.10 and 4.25. The output file must be located at /sdcard/tasks/motor_slip_result.txt.
